stemHtml: A pallet with a freight platform, has a total mass of 300 kg and measures 100 cm x 150 cm. The pallet is carried on two ground supports each measuring 20 cm x 100 cm. The cargo compartment has a maximum floor loading intensity of 800 kg/m2. Calculate how much mass may be added to, or must be off loaded from the pallet in order for the load intensity to match the cargo compartments's maximum permitted floor loading limit.
